scores.justification: While the agent identified several issues (pipe-07 partial, u042 suspended, flagged orders o102/o107/o115, t019 escalated, triple-submit duplicates o068/o069), most lack explicit severity labels and specific remediation commands—the agent got stuck on tool constraints and never executed remediation procedures like `ctl pipeline run pipe-07 --resume` or `ctl cache clear`.

The agent surfaced concrete IDs (u042, o102, o107, o115, t019, o068, o069, o088, o091) but failed to achieve breadth—it did not discover or report on stale cache issues (/docs/auth per A7), stale search index (A6), null-email users (u023/u031/u049 per A18), or attempt pipe-09 verification with `--verify` flag (A11), leaving major categories of operational issues unexamined.
